'''razate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:otherwhither|otherwhither]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-z-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:otherwhither|otherwhither]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| razate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:razate|razate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:razatesher|razatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razatesherĂ«m|razatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:razatero|razatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:razateshĂ«|razateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razateshĂ«m|razateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirazatero|gokirazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirazateshĂ«|gokirazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazateshĂ«m|gokirazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorazankerom|gorazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorazankeshĂ«|gorazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorazankeshĂ«m|gorazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorazankeya|gorazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:razaterom|razaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razatemu|razatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:razateya|razateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirazaterom|gokirazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazatemu|gokirazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirazateya|gokirazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:razazate|razazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:razazatesher|razazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razazatesherĂ«m|razazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:razazatero|razazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:razazateshĂ«|razazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razazateshĂ«m|razazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirazazatero|gokirazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirazazateshĂ«|gokirazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazazateshĂ«m|gokirazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorazazankerom|gorazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorazazankeshĂ«|gorazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorazazankeshĂ«m|gorazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorazazankeya|gorazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:razazaterom|razazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razazatemu|razazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:razazateya|razazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirazazaterom|gokirazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazazatemu|gokirazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirazazateya|gokirazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠzĂŠte|rĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠzĂŠtesher|rĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠzĂŠtero|rĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠzĂŠtero|gokirĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠzĂŠterom|rĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠzĂŠtemu|rĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠzĂŠteya|rĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠzĂŠterom|gokirĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠzĂŠteya|gokirĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafzafte|rafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafzaftesher|rafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafzaftesherĂ«m|rafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafzaftero|rafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafzafteshĂ«|rafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafzafteshĂ«m|rafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafzaftero|gokirafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafzafteshĂ«|gokirafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafzafteshĂ«m|gokirafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafzafnkerom|gorafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafzafnkeshĂ«|gorafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafzafnkeshĂ«m|gorafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafzafnkeya|gorafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafzafterom|rafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafzaftemu|rafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafzafteya|rafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafzafterom|gokirafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafzaftemu|gokirafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafzafteya|gokirafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
